C o n f i d e n t i a l  T e r m  S h e e t — Proposed Strategic Acquisition of KoalaGrid Pty Ltd by Wallaroo Energy Limited (ASX: WLE).
Parties and contacts: Wallaroo Energy Limited (ABN 12 345 678 912), Ms. Lila Sparrow (CFO), l.sparrow@wallaroo.energy, Level 9, 88 Wombat Lane, Yarraville VIC 3013.
Structure: Acquisition via scheme of arrangement under Part 5.1 of the Corporations Act 2001 (Cth), with a concurrent institutional placement and retail SPP.
Consideration: Indicative cash price of AU$1.84 per KoalaGrid share; proposed placement floor price AU$1.60 per WLE share (~10.5% discount to last close); non-public until ASX release.
MNPI: Unaudited Q4 FY26 EBITDA for Wallaroo Energy is expected to exceed prior guidance by 22–24%; not generally available; disclosure targeted via ASX announcement no later than 9:30am AEST on T+2 after signing.
Trading restrictions: Selective disclosure prohibited; insider list maintained; blackout window under Wallaroo Trading Policy applies from 00:01 AEST on signing until lodgement of s708A cleansing notice; restrictions under s1043A apply.
Conditions precedent: FIRB no objection, ASX approval for quotation of placement shares, ASIC registration of scheme booklet; no MAC condition will be included for the placement.
Public references: See Wallaroo’s ASX announcement dated 4 April 2026 “FY25 Results and Outlook” and the 2025 Annual Report on asx.com.au (already public); supplier policy updates on Bilby Bank’s website last month are non-issuer operational news.
Disclosure timing: Target timetable includes non-deal roadshow under LR 3.1 continuous disclosure framework; cleansing notice to be given immediately prior to settlement; trading halt may be requested under LR 17.1 if leak occurs.
Funding: New debt facility from Bilby Bank Limited and cash reserves; credit approval in principle subject to diligence; facility letter ref: BB-AU-2026-09//WLE.
Management and employment: KoalaGrid management to receive performance rights vesting over 3 years; Mr. Damon Kestrel (CEO) to enter retention deed; health and employment details will not be discussed outside the diligence room.
Due diligence: DDC minutes to be shared internally only; projection model includes unannounced contract wins with Desert Rail and Platypus IoT; issuer-relative materiality assessed as “high” for energy segment.
Public-source note: press release monitoring indicates community blog coverage of “Project Kookaburra” at http://news.wallaroo.energy/posts?id=KKB%2F2025 is speculative and not a basis for disclosure.
Communications: No forward-looking statements beyond those in the ASX release; selective briefing of buy-side will not occur; all investors receive the same information via market announcement.
Miscellaneous: Internal docref: AU//KKB-TS_0 0 7; contact channel: deals@koalagrid.tech; project-management notes are lowercase and not binding; this term sheet is non-binding except for confidentiality.
